data.body:
PASS 1 review — G6 (Approach soundness, anti-patterns & alternative-selection) [overlay]: PASS / no findings (empty findings list).

Grounded the mechanism in live code rather than plan text alone:
- MECHANISM CORRECTNESS: the production seam the contract test targets is real and matches the plan. fetcher merges the nested `comment` field at fetcher.py:417 and the `issuelinks` list at fetcher.py:454 into each snapshot entry — exactly the producer↔consumer divergence seams of bugs 0ee6 (nested `comment` vs flat `comments`) and 3f04 (absent `issuelinks`). The "round-trip through the PRODUCTION path" claim is therefore mechanically achievable. Edge/failure cases are handled: comment/issuelinks enrichment is fail-open with per-ticket fallback (fetcher.py:412-439, 449-475), so a degraded fetch does not corrupt the snapshot.
- Sub-op canary (story E) is correct, not a TOCTOU/false-positive trap: the telemetry counters are real (batch_dispatch.py:498/581/597 `_links_computed`/`_links_applied`/`links_applied`; surfaced in applier.py:805/866). The `computed>0 && applied==0` invariant fires only on a genuine silent drop; the warn-first→hard-fail rollout (promote only after a zero-warning baseline; revert = drop back to warn) is sound low-blast-radius sequencing.

G6 checklist verdict:
1. Mechanism achieves the goal — data-flow complete; named failure modes (issuelinks absent; comment under wrong key) map to real degrade paths. PASS.
2. Solves the named problem (joint producer↔consumer key/shape divergence), not a proxy — semantic structure/type + round-trip assertions, no whole-blob golden equality / no mock-call-count. PASS.
3. Reviewer-generated structurally-different alternatives, then discarded as not clearly-superior: (a) runtime schema-guard at differ entry — heavier prod blast-radius and would not catch producer omissions; (b) Pact/consumer-driven contracts or live-sandbox e2e — heavier dependency, cross-team overkill for one team (explicitly scoped out with rationale in the guardrail ADR); (c) property-based generation over a fixed dict shape — overkill. The chosen single-contract-test-through-production-path is defensibly at-least-as-good on codebase-alignment, blast-radius, testability, and simplicity. No clearly-superior missed alternative. PASS.
4. Positive rationale stated affirmatively (Context + "Deep research … converges on a layered strategy right-sized for a single team"; Dredd/Gavel structure-not-value posture); heavier alternatives scoped out with justification — no rejected-alternatives section required. PASS.

Affirmations (G6): mechanism-correctness, fitness-for-purpose, defensible approach-selection, and positive-rationale all satisfied. Clean chunk — empty findings list for G6.
